faq.aboutPlatform.whatIsMyTourAnswer: MyTour is a product of DINNO LLC, a subsidiary of Ameriabank. MyTour is a travel platform where market-leading operators' offers are presented and bookings can be made online in just a few minutes, without visiting a travel agency.
faq.aboutPlatform.howToUse: How can I use the MyTour platform?
faq.aboutPlatform.howToUseAnswer: MyTour is available in Ameriabank's My Ameria app - accessible only to Ameriabank customers, and as a separate website - mytour.am, which is available to everyone.
faq.aboutPlatform.whoToContact: Who should I contact in case of issues with bookings?
faq.aboutPlatform.whoToContactAnswer: For any issues related to packages booked through MyTour, please contact MyTour's support team at 033 320050.
faq.aboutPlatform.hasOfficeAnswer: Yes, MyTour's office is located at Argishti 2/1, however, there is no need to visit the office to make bookings - bookings are fully online.
faq.bookings.destinations: What destinations are currently available on the platform?
faq.bookings.destinationsAnswer: Currently, we have complete packages to Egypt, as well as hotels in the UAE, Cyprus, and the Maldives. The list of destinations is constantly expanding, and hotels in other countries will soon be available on MyTour.
faq.bookings.realPrices: Are the prices shown real and final?
faq.bookings.realPricesAnswer: Yes, all prices shown on the platform are valid at the time of booking and do not involve any additional payments.
faq.bookings.priceChangesAnswer: Booking prices are fixed at the time of booking. Only the value of the unpaid balance of packages may change - increase or become more affordable - due to exchange rate fluctuations.
faq.bookings.recalculationSpeed: How quickly can I get a price quote for the selected package based on changed dates, number of guests and age, room type
faq.bookings.recalculationSpeedAnswer: Recalculations are done in real-time. By editing the necessary parameters, users can immediately get the new price.
faq.bookings.confirmationTime: How long does it take to confirm a package booking?
faq.bookings.confirmationTimeAnswer: Package confirmation is usually completed within 1 business day, but during especially busy seasons, confirmations may take up to 3 business days. If the booking is not confirmed, the payment made will be refunded to the user.
faq.bookings.hotelRequest: Can I request a hotel if it is not listed on the platform?
faq.bookings.hotelRequestAnswer: Yes, if you cannot find your preferred hotel on the platform, please contact our team and it will be added to the system very quickly.
faq.bookings.bookForOthers: Can I make a booking for another person?
faq.bookings.bookForOthersAnswer: Yes, the platform does not limit the purchase of packages for other people.
faq.bookings.consultation: Is it possible to get advice about packages and hotels if I cannot make a choice on my own?
faq.bookings.consultationAnswer: Yes, of course, for any questions related to hotels, you can contact us at 033 320050.
faq.payments.howToPay: How are payments made through MyTour?
faq.payments.howToPayAnswer: Payments through MyTour platform are made exclusively in cashless form.
faq.payments.acceptedCards: What cards can I pay with for bookings through MyTour?
faq.payments.acceptedCardsAnswer: Through MyTour, you can make payments with any card issued by Armenian banks, except for МИР and American Express card types.
faq.payments.installment: Can I make bookings on installment?
faq.payments.installmentAnswer: Not at the moment, but this opportunity will be available very soon.
faq.payments.withoutPrepayment: Can I make a booking without prepayment?
faq.payments.withoutPrepaymentAnswer: For Egypt, UAE and Cyprus, bookings more than 40 days in advance can be made without prepayment, and the first payment can be made 35 days before the flight - 50% of the package value. The second payment is made 10 days before the flight.
faq.payments.cancellationAnswer: Cancellation rules are set according to destination and the cooperating partner. The cancellation conditions for each package or hotel are presented on the individual page of that offer.
faq.partnership.whichAgencies: Which agencies do you cooperate with?
faq.partnership.whichAgenciesAnswer: MyTour presents operators' offers directly. We cooperate with Sky Tour, Maratuk, Anriva, Adventures, and Erebuni Air. The list of partner companies is constantly expanding.
faq.partnership.howToPartner: How can I become a partner?
faq.partnership.howToPartnerAnswer: To become a partner, you need to send your details - organization name, your full name and phone number to bookings@mytour.am email address, and our team will contact you.
